headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 12, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense with 2 RBI. Joey Cantillo pitched a strong 6.0 innings for the Guardians, earning the win. In other news, the New York Yankees dropped a 2-3 decision to the Baltimore Orioles, with Coby Mayo leading the Orioles' offense with a home run and three RBIs. The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez hitting two home runs and driving in five runs.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, including Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026. The Detroit Tigers have also made several roster moves, transferring Justin Verlander to the 60-day injured list and placing Kerry Carpenter on the 10-day injured list.

The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a trade, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants have traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians in their latest matchup. Travis Bazzana led the Angels' offense with 2 RBI, while Joey Cantillo pitched a strong 6.0 innings for the Guardians, earning the win.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall Short in Baltimore**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dropped a 2-3 decision to the Baltimore Orioles, with Coby Mayo leading the Orioles' offense with a home run and three RBIs. Ryan Weathers pitched 6.1 innings for the Orioles, striking out nine and allowing two earned runs.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs and drove in five runs, while Bryan Baker earned the save with a scoreless inning of relief.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Shut Out Rangers 1-0**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow victory over the Texas Rangers, with Michael Soroka earning the win after 6.1 innings of scoreless relief. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with a 2-hit performance, including a crucial double that plated the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays' Barger Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Jose Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have acquired outfielder Jose Requena in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
